note: rev 2 (owner caught rev 1 in the PNG: the blanket fill converted the REAL basin water at the I6-c2/d2 boundary into land -- measurement confirms the basin, channel and bay are ONE connected water component in the original OSM data, so the basin must stay water). The fill now covers ONLY the harbour wall band plus a ~130 m margin on its basin side (total ~300 m, thick enough for the SDF to hold), restoring the wall that the edit_005 corridor clips while leaving the basin water untouched.
